AuditSqlReader.list mode: audit_log sanitizes invalid limit/offset (negative, NaN, oversize) to safe defaults

AuditSqlReader.list mode: stynx_events uses defaults for missing operation/entity/tenancy fields

StynxAuditService hash-chain verification accepts sequential audit rows and rejects tampered payloads
StynxAuditController API contract keeps audit log access guarded and permission-bound
StynxAuditController API contract delegates audit log queries to the audit service
StynxAuditService.listLog queries audit.log with no filters and clamps limit to [1, 200]
StynxAuditService.listLog returns nextCursor when there is a tail row beyond the limit
StynxAuditService.listLog omits nextCursor when no tail row
StynxAuditService.listLog applies all filters and the cursor when set
StynxAuditService.listLog throws when Database provider is unavailable
StynxAuditService.dryRunDetachEligible skips partitions whose name does not match log_YYYY_MM
StynxAuditService.detachEligible returns [] when there are no eligible plans
StynxAuditService.detachEligible throws when partitions exist but no bucket/dumpRunner/archive are configured
StynxAuditService.runDailyDetachJob runs detach but logs nothing when nothing detached
StynxAuditService.verifyChain clamps limit to [1, 10000]
StynxAuditService.verifyChain returns valid=true with totalChecked=0 when no rows
StynxAuditService.verifyChain rejects a chain whose first row has a non-null previous_hash
@stynx/audit barrel exports at least one symbol
